title: Hardcore Revivestone
description: A block that spawns when you die can be right clicked by anyone to revive you, at a cost of course.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QbPoyDKnWGM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# What does it do?

![Dying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b91f915b3598fe827a92e362bfb35f632fa2ee4_0.webp)

Whenever you die, it will place a revivestone for you. (Highly recommend corpse for keeping your items)
# What does the revivestone do?
![Reviving](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390e6509ae74b41fb0663a4cbcd6325a02d49d8d.png)

When another player happens to stumble on it, they may right click it to save you after a while. You will get weak after being reborn, and your reviver will lose some hunger.
# How hard is it to find the revivestone?
![Block seen through walls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d0eee731e961d04ca670a519b99e4961578dc4d_0.webp)

When you die, it will broadcast your death coordinates to your location, (and you may type /h.xaerosupp to have it broadcast a waypoint for xaero's minimap as well) and will have a glowing effect through walls.
